description.text: "StatMHO" is the unit of conductance, admittance, and susceptance in the C.G.S e.s.u system of units. One $statmho$ is the conductance between two points in a conductor when a constant potential difference of $1 \; statvolt$ applied between the points produces in the conductor a current of $1 \; statampere$, the conductor not being the source of any electromotive force, approximately $1.1126 \times 10^{-12} mho$.
